apprunner.service.imagerepository.ImageC.Docs: Configuration for running the identified image.

apprunner.service.imagerepository.ImageI.Docs: The identifier of an image.  For an image in Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR), this is an image name. For the image name format, see [Pulling an image](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AmazonECR/latest/userguide/docker-pull-ecr-image.html) in the *Amazon ECR User Guide*.

apprunner.service.imagerepository.ImageR.Docs: The type of the image repository. This reflects the repository provider and whether the repository is private or public.
